footer.tagline: Building digital excellence for businesses worldwide.

home.headline: Launch. Rank. Scale.
home.description: One team. Full digital stack. We handle web development, SEO, paid ads, and branding — so you can focus on building your business. Jakarta-based, globally delivered, at a fraction of Western agency costs.

caseStudy.label: Featured Project
caseStudy.title: Qianlima — Cross-Border Hiring at Scale
caseStudy.description: Built from scratch for Chinese corporations recruiting Indonesian talent. A multi-language recruitment platform handling complex candidate screening, cross-border HR workflows, and enterprise-grade compliance — live and growing.

about.heading: We build digital infrastructure for serious businesses.
about.p1: Enztronic is a full-stack digital agency based in Jakarta, Indonesia. We work with startups, founders, and growing businesses that need a complete digital team — not a patchwork of vendors.
about.p2: We combine engineering, SEO, paid advertising, and branding into one coherent operation. No handoffs between agencies. No lost context. Just execution — delivered globally at a fraction of Western rates.

services.heading: What We Do
services.subheading: Everything a startup needs to launch, get found, and grow — under one roof.

items.title: Web Development
items.description: Fast, scalable websites and apps built to convert — not just look good. We ship in weeks, not months.

items.title: SEO & Content
items.description: Rank on Google before your runway runs out. We build search presence that compounds over time.

items.title: Paid Advertising
items.description: Ad spend that actually returns. We run performance campaigns with tight tracking from day one.

items.title: Branding
items.description: A brand that looks serious from launch day. Logo, identity, and guidelines built to scale with you.

items.title: Growth Consulting
items.description: Strategy first, execution second. We help founders prioritize what actually moves the needle.

items.title: UI/UX Design
items.description: Interfaces that users actually understand. Research-backed design that reduces churn and increases conversions.

portfolio.heading: Our Portfolio
portfolio.description: Successful projects across recruitment, consulting, digital marketing, and e-commerce. From brand creation to SEO dominance.

projects.title: Qianlima
projects.description: Cross-border hiring platform connecting Chinese corporations with Indonesian talent. Features multi-language support (ID/CN/EN), advanced candidate filtering, enterprise-grade security, and a comprehensive HR workflow management system.

projects.title: Monopole Consulting
projects.description: Fine and rare wine consultation services website designed for both Taiwanese and US clients. Bilingual interface (English/Traditional Chinese), wine list catalog, consulting services, events management, and tasting notes - developed from scratch with client branding.

projects.title: Setia Karya (AC Mobil Murah)
projects.description: Complete brand transformation and digital marketing campaign. Created the iconic brand jargon "Car, Bus, Truck & Heavy Equipment Air Conditioning Service". Built website, implemented Google Ads strategy, and managed social media channels including YouTube, Instagram, and Facebook.

projects.title: Berdi Rental
projects.description: Car rental landing page that achieved SEO ranking #1 in just 1 week. Built brand identity from scratch with strategic SEO optimization, creating a high-performing website that immediately captured organic search traffic.

projects.title: ShortPro
projects.description: Complete digital ecosystem setup including website development, FTP infrastructure, email domain configuration, and content production. Managed official Instagram presence, paid advertising, and ongoing digital events for local market establishment.

projects.title: Salim Berkat Sejahtera
projects.description: Website and email domain setup for PT. Salim Berkat Sejahtera in Balikpapan, Kalimantan Timur. Focused on establishing professional online presence and brand identity for the company.

blog.label: Insights
blog.heading: Latest news from ENZTRONIC
blog.description: Articles, case studies, and agency updates for digital transformation, web development, and growth marketing.
blog.placeholderDetail: We're preparing high-quality stories about digital products, branding, and successful campaigns. Check back soon.

contact.label: Get in touch
contact.heading: Start Your Project
contact.description: Tell us what you're building. We'll get back to you within 24 hours with a clear next step — no fluff.
contact.formServiceTooltip: It's okay if you didn't know what services you need from us, most of our clients has their own demand but they didn't know where to start digitally. So we're here to help.
contact.formBudgetTooltip: More budget doesn't always mean more customers coming, but this really helps us ease our work in the future.
contact.formMessagePlaceholder: Briefly describe what you're looking to build or achieve...
contact.formPreferredTimeTooltip: We will reach you as soon as possible, but we need you to add time preference and which country you are in, so we know the time zone.
contact.formSuccessMessage: Your message has been received. We'll review your project and reach out within 24 hours.
contact.formError: Something went wrong. Please email us directly.
